title: About Anupam Bearings
content: Anupam Bearings is a certified Timken parts supplier based in India, with offices in Bengaluru and Chennai. Founded under the visionary leadership of Mr. Anant Kumar Singh, Founder and Mentor, Anupam Bearings has secured a significant share in the national market. The company began its Timken partnership in 2023, marking the beginning of a powerful and enduring alliance built on shared values, innovation, and a relentless pursuit of excellence. Together with Timken, Anupam Bearings is committed to driving forward India's industrial growth one bearing at a time.

title: Anupam Bearings Bengaluru Office
content: Bengaluru Office: No. 128, Jigani Link Road, Bommasandra Industrial Area, Bengaluru - 560 099, Karnataka. Phone: +91-98844-00741. Additional numbers: +91-96771-13860, +91-98400-88509. Email: sales@anupambearings.com. The Bengaluru office handles sales and distribution for Karnataka and surrounding regions.

title: Anupam Bearings Chennai Office
content: Chennai Office: No. 3 (Old No.2) Katchaleeswarar Pagoda Lane, Parrys, Chennai - 600001, Tamil Nadu. Phone: 044-4691-2265, 044-4779-1419. Additional numbers: +91-98400-88509, +91-98844-00509. Email: info@anupambearings.com. The Chennai office serves Tamil Nadu, Andhra Pradesh, and surrounding southern states.

title: Timken Partnership and Certification
content: Anupam Bearings is an authorized and certified Timken parts supplier since 2023. Timken, founded in the 1890s by Henry Timken, is a global leader in tapered roller bearings with over 125 years of engineering excellence. Timken supplies bearings to industries ranging from automotive to aerospace. As a certified partner, Anupam Bearings guarantees genuine Timken products with full warranty and quality assurance.

title: Services Offered by Anupam Bearings
content: Anupam Bearings offers the following services: mapping customer requirements to the right products; organising training programmes, seminars and bearing clinics to address specific problems; preventive and pro-active maintenance programs; pre-dispatch inspection service to ensure quality; assistance in mounting and maintenance of bearings; just-in-time (JIT) deliveries to minimize inventory; annual rate contracts for predictable pricing; annual service contracts for ongoing support; bearing banks to ensure critical spares availability; and technical consultation for industrial applications.

title: Website and Online Presence
content: Anupam Bearings website: www.anupambearings.com. Customers can browse products, submit enquiries, and contact the team through the website. General enquiries: info@anupambearings.com. Sales enquiries: sales@anupambearings.com.
